title: Streaming Responses
description: Developer consumes real-time streamed AI output, handling text chunks, tool-call deltas, and finish events via SSE/chunked responses.

actors.name: Developer
actors.description: Consumes the streaming API; iterates events, registers callbacks, returns HTTP responses

actors.name: AI Provider
actors.description: Backend (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, etc.) that generates the raw token stream via TextProvider::stream()

actors.name: Queue Worker
actors.description: Executes BroadcastAgent jobs for async broadcast streaming

actors.name: Browser / SSE Client
actors.description: Receives chunked SSE or Vercel-protocol data over HTTP

actors.name: WebSocket Channel
actors.description: Receives broadcast StreamEvents via Laravel Echo/Reverb channels

use_cases.name: Stream Agent Response
use_cases.description: Invoke agent and receive a lazy StreamableAgentResponse backed by a generator closure. No I/O happens until iterated.

use_cases.name: Iterate Stream Events
use_cases.description: Lazily pulls events from the generator. On first iteration calls provider->stream(AgentPrompt). Events cached on Collection after first pass. Builds StreamedAgentResponse on completion.

use_cases.name: Consume Text Delta Chunks
use_cases.description: Receives TextDelta events (type='text_delta') carrying incremental text. TextDelta::combine() aggregates all deltas into full text.

use_cases.name: Handle Tool Call Events
use_cases.description: Receives ToolCall streaming events (type='tool_call') with tool id, name, arguments, optional reasoningId.
use_cases.event_payload: id, invocationId, toolCall{id, name, arguments, reasoningId}, timestamp

use_cases.name: Handle Tool Result Events
use_cases.description: Receives ToolResult events (type='tool_result') with result, successful flag, and optional error.
use_cases.event_payload: id, invocationId, toolResult{id, name, result}, successful, error, timestamp

use_cases.name: Receive Stream Finish Event
use_cases.description: StreamEnd event (type='stream_end') signals completion; carries finish reason and token Usage. StreamEnd::combineUsage() aggregates across multi-step responses.
use_cases.event_payload: id, invocationId, reason, usage{inputTokens, outputTokens}, timestamp

use_cases.name: Register Post-Stream Callback
use_cases.description: Registers a callback invoked after full iteration completes. If already streamed, callback fires immediately. Receives complete StreamedAgentResponse with text, usage, toolCalls, toolResults.

use_cases.name: Return SSE HTTP Response
Stream Using Vercel AI SDK Protocol
use_cases.description: Uses CanStreamUsingVercelProtocol trait. Sends start, text-delta, tool-input-available, tool-output-available, finish events. Defers StreamEnd to last. Sets x-vercel-ai-ui-message-stream: v1 header.

use_cases.name: Broadcast Stream Events (Sync)
use_cases.entry_point: Agent::broadcast(prompt, channels, attachments?, now?, ...) or Agent::broadcastNow()
use_cases.description: Iterates stream; calls StreamEvent::broadcastNow(channels) per event using Laravel Broadcast. Sends immediately over WebSocket channels.

use_cases.name: Broadcast Stream Events (Queued Job)
use_cases.description: BroadcastAgent (ShouldQueue) queues stream+broadcast. handle() calls agent.stream().each(event→broadcastNow(channels)).then(response→withCallbacks()). DisplayName returns agent class.

use_cases.name: Associate Stream with Conversation
use_cases.description: Sets conversationId and conversationUser on the response for conversation tracking.

use_cases.name: Receive Reasoning Events
use_cases.entry_point: foreach yields ReasoningStart / ReasoningDelta / ReasoningEnd events
use_cases.description: Dedicated reasoning lifecycle events for chain-of-thought providers. Subtypes of StreamEvent.

key_classes.name: StreamableAgentResponse
key_classes.key_properties: invocationId, generator(Closure), meta, events(Collection), text, usage, conversationId, usesVercelProtocol, thenCallbacks[], streamedResponse

key_classes.name: StreamedAgentResponse
key_classes.description: Immutable aggregate built after full iteration; holds events, text, usage, toolCalls, toolResults.

key_classes.name: BroadcastAgent
key_classes.constructor_params: Agent $agent, string $prompt, Channel|array $channels, array $attachments, provider, model

key_relationships: StreamableAgentResponse implements Responsable (returns SSE HTTP response)
StreamableAgentResponse creates StreamedAgentResponse after first full iteration
All streaming events extend abstract StreamEvent
Agent interface defines stream(), broadcast(), broadcastNow(), broadcastOnQueue()
Promptable trait implements Agent interface stream/broadcast methods
Multiple AI gateways implement TextProvider::stream() → StreamableAgentResponse
important_notes: StreamableAgentResponse is lazy — no HTTP/AI call until iterated. Events are cached after first iteration for reuse. then() fires immediately if already streamed. Vercel protocol defers StreamEnd to end of stream and filters orphan ToolResults. BroadcastAgent uses InvokesQueuedResponseCallbacks concern for post-job callbacks.
